parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '🚨 EMERGENCY MAINTENANCE REQUEST

Ticket: ' + $('Prep Dispatch Data').item.json.ticket_id + '
Unit: ' + $('Prep Dispatch Data').item.json.unit + '
Tenant: ' + $('Prep Dispatch Data').item.json.tenant_name + '
Issue: ' + $('Prep Dispatch Data').item.json.issue_description + '
Category: ' + $('Prep Dispatch Data').item.json.ai_category + '
Vendor Dispatched: ' + $('Prep Dispatch Data').item.json.vendor_name + '

SLA: 2 hours — immediate response required.' }) }}
